milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16c — Doc-modal polish. Focus trap + focus restore (close button grabs focus on open, previously-focused element regrabs on close, stray focus is pulled back while open). Loading spinner behind iframe fades out on load. Scroll-lock bookkeeping unified into one refreshModalOpenBodyClass() helper — replaces 7 drifted inline selector lists plus video-modal's unconditional unlock, so body.modal-open now tracks 'any modal visible' exactly.
